content.text:
# The Agile Millionaires

Mike and Joe, two coaches bold,
Had dreams of agile worth their weight in gold,
With AI tools to guide their way,
They sought to change how teams would play.

*"Individuals and interactions,"*
They preached with passion, not distractions,
*Over processes and tools so cold,*
A human-centered truth they told.

The algorithms learned their craft,
While Mike and Joe just smiled and laughed,
*"Working software,"* came their cry,
*Over docs that pile up to the sky.*

Their AI parsed each sprint and stand-up,
Helping struggling teams to grand-up,
*"Customer collaboration,"* they would teach,
*Over contracts out of reach.*

The retrospechoes filled with wisdom,
Backlogs flowed in perfect rhythm,
*"Responding to change,"* their golden rule,
*Over plans that lock you to a tool.*

The clients came from near and far,
To learn from coaches raising bar,
With AI insights crisp and clear,
They banished every project fear.

The millions rolled like waterfalls
(The irony not lost at all),
For teams that once were stuck and slow
Now thrived with help from Mike and Joe.

Two millionaires with hearts still true,
To values that they always knew:
That people, working, change, and trust,
Made agile coaching truly just.

So raise a glass to this duo grand,
Who built an empire, sprint-by-hand,
With AI as their trusted friend,
Their agile legacy won't end.
